sections.paragraph:
Original: יעלה יעלא

Transliteration: ya‛ălâ' ya‛ălâh

Phonetic: yah-al-aw'

BDB Definition:

Jaala or Jaalah = "ascending"
  1. the head of a family of the descendants of Solomon's slaves who returned from exile with Zerubbabel

Origin: the same as H3280 or direct from H3276

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
